\tzpentry{ID5605}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5605 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \cos\theta'=\hat{\bm{r}}\cdot\hat{\bm{n}}(t). \end{equation}
